title: Trump shooter had little time, left little trace of deadly plot
shortDescription: In an increasingly online world, Thomas Matthew Crooks, 20, seems to have stayed hidden while devising a plan to murder a former U.S. president.

shortDescription: The Day 3 schedule at the RNC includes talk of foreign policy and a speech from Donald Trump's VP pick JD Vance.

title: A hero, a firefighter, a Trump supporter. What will his death mean?
shortDescription: There are few figures as unifying in America as a firefighter. Still, Corey Comperatore is being laid to rest amid toxic, deadly political division.

title: 'Arm yourself': GOP pro-gun positions unchanged after Trump shooting
shortDescription: Gun-rights advocates and a top Trump surrogate talked about why they believe gun control is a bad idea.

title: Trump, GOP play for Latino voters pays off. Hispanics explain why.
shortDescription: In 2024, the GOP is stressing everyday life issues — inflation, crime and the unfairness of an "open border."

title: Police shooting of man at RNC raises questions days after Trump attack

title: Arizona delegate sports makeshift bandage to support Trump at RNC
